programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: Thou Shall Not Sext
programme.desc: The McGees set ground rules for courting and intimacy and ask a potential sister wife to meet in person, while the Winders launch their online dating profile! Meanwhile, the Snowdens decide to make a move that could impact Vanessa's life in a serious way.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: The Waiting Game …
programme.desc: The Snowdens arrive in LA and hope their relationship with Vanessa will still work under one roof. The McGees nervously prep for Brandy's arrival, and the Alldredges ask Jennifer to come for a visit, while the Winders find a possible interest online.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Rudy and Gia
programme.desc: Couponer Rudy and her husband, Chase, are renewing their vows and Rudy wants to spend just $20 on the reception.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Krista and Amanda
programme.desc: Amanda must get all of the food for her sister's baby shower for less than $60.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Julie and Faatima
programme.desc: Julie has the chance to land her dream job: being paid to coupon for a sober home for teenage boys.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Missy and Nicole
programme.desc: Missy plans to get 700 toothbrushes and other supplies to donate to a center that helps teen moms. Former marine and single mom Nicole can keep her daughter in dance lessons because of couponing.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Scott and Jen
programme.desc: Scott gears up for one last shopping trip before his wife Amy gives birth. Jen uses couponing to home school her twin six-year-olds.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Michelle and Tyler
programme.desc: Michelle uses her coupon savings to build a dream home for her family. College student Tyler hopes to impress his mom with his couponing skills.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Jane and Judy
programme.desc: Jane must save enough at the store to cover much-needed home repairs, while veteran couponer Judy teaches a coupon class.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Judy and Faatima
programme.desc: Faatima is couponing in order to move her family out of their dangerous neighbourhood in Detroit. Judy uses couponing to help her family and friends.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Amanda and Jess
programme.desc: Amanda tries to teach her parents to coupon so she can take some time off from shopping. Jess is a shopaholic and coupon addict.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Susan and Cole
programme.desc: Susan tries to beat her savings record, while Cole's roommate has a few requests.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Joni and Angelique
programme.desc: Joni supports her family of nine along with her charities through couponing. Angelique stays up all night planning for her shopping trip.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Amber and Amanda
programme.desc: Amber Flores feeds her family of six on $50 a week. Amanda tries to best her own couponing record.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Paula's Story
programme.desc: Paula has had a tough life and, at more than 600 pounds, has built a wall around herself to push people away. When she suddenly loses someone she loves, Paula can no longer ignore the threat of losing her own life -- especially for her children's sake.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Janine
programme.desc: A year since her weight loss journey began, Janine is still in the 500s and mostly immobile, and now, Dr. Nowzaradan is running out of options for how to treat her if she can't find a way to control her eating habit and start walking again.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Scared Cyst-Less
programme.desc: Taylore is a beautiful, young woman with unsightly elf-like bumps on her ears. Jose never goes out because of the baseball-sized lump on his head. Ken is covered in painful bumps that make it difficult to do everyday things.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The World's Largest Lump
programme.desc: Ronen's mysterious lump above his knee is one of the largest Dr. Lee has ever seen. Amber suffers from a debilitating skin disease that no one understands. Sandy has a neck lump she calls Tommy. Kristy's eyelid cyst is ruining her life.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Paris and Tara
programme.desc: Paris enlists Nev and Max to help her figure out who has been catfishing her for the past four years. As the guys investigate, they make a shocking discovery that casts suspicion onto Paris herself.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Candic and Titus
programme.desc: After months of intimate text exchanges with a man she met online named Titus, Candic has decided to finally stop and fess up to her husband. But before she does, she needs Nev and Max to help her find out who Titus really is.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Alante and Nevaeh
programme.desc: Alante has spent the last eight years planning a life with his online love, Nevaeh. She's perfect, but her disappearances have Alante worried. Nev and Max help to uncover a mysterious truth that affects Alante's entire town.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Johnny and Connor
programme.desc: Nev and Max are recruited by Jonathon after his online romantic interest disappears for a month. When the guys realize a former catfish is involved, they begin to question Jonathon's sincerity.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Infiniti and Dave
programme.desc: 19-year-old dancer Infiniti wants Nev and Max to help her find out if her online love is real. What the pair uncover is far shadier than either of them had ever imagined.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Rob Gronkowski

programme.title: The First 48: The Chase/ One Shot
programme.desc: A detective needs to determine whether two people seen fleeing a murder scene are witnesses or killers.

programme.title: The First 48: Murder in Pleasant Grove
programme.desc: In Dallas, a dismembered body is found burned in an open field. With no leads on the victim's identity, detectives turn to the public for help in solving this baffling case.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Was It Enough?
programme.desc: Tony and Dennis try to get their hands on drugs, while Jennifer strives to save a troubled inmate.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Special Ops
programme.desc: Etowah County was the most challenging jail in the history of the show, with the phase one participants gathering more information than ever before. Now the sheriff is sending in five more for 30 days to see how far the facility has come.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Fe-mail
programme.desc: The Joker that absolutely hates massages; and the length of time it took the make-up team to get Joe all doled up for his debut as a female techie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: All the Wrong Moves
programme.desc: What prop does Murr carry almost daily? Which Jokers danced in their high school musical?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Welcome to Miami
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joke and Dagger
programme.desc: The guys crash a gallery opening where their antics aren't appreciated, they pass bizarre judgment on unsuspecting grocery shoppers, and the loser takes a spin on a terrifying wheel where one wrong move could have deadly consequences.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Swim Shady
programme.desc: Find out how long Q was 'sleeping' before the guys decided to have him stay asleep for 30 minutes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
programme.desc: The guys hit the seas for a special cruise episode. They turn the pool deck into a playground, give misinformation while posing as entertainment directors, and two Jokers get a double dose of torture in a two-part punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Adam Devine
programme.desc: Adam Devine patriotically challenges the wings of death; all while channeling Macho Man Randy Savage and his Pitch Perfect audition.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Jonas Brothers
programme.desc: The Jonas Brothers battle against the wings of death while discussing topics such as Met Gala hangouts with OBJ and Taylor Swift's anti-paparazzi techniques.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Down in the Dump
programme.desc: Find out what objects other than pencils the Jokers have considered putting on people, and whose sister frequently helps on the show. Plus, learn what prop has become a fan favorite.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scaredy Cat
programme.desc: Find out which Joker almost walked out of a challenge, and what scene inspired the name of a fan's baby. Plus, learn which Joker is allergic to cats.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Fashion
programme.desc: Find out what challenge needed to be cancelled and rescheduled three times, and why some people didn't want to be included in the show. Plus, learn what questions the guys prepared that didn't make the cut.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Get Out of Dodge
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out which Joker used to run a business and how Rosie O'Donnell became a fan of the show. Plus, find out how Murr surprised the guys on the set.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Truth Hurts

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Blunder Years

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: In Poor Taste Buds
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr take to the court to serve up some seriously personal tennis lessons and then head to the park for a bewildering game of Now! The loser must put his face through the ultimate test during a food presentation.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Look Out Below
programme.desc: The Jokers lack hospitality as bumbling bellhops, pitch bizarre inventions to a confused focus group and serve lunch with a side of awkward when they man hot dog stands. Then, the guys reach for the sky to surprise tonight’s big loser.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of TP
programme.desc: The guys swipe food off other diners' plates at a buffet, tutor students in foreign languages they don't speak, and try to start a dance party in a public park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Nationals Disaster

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashian Family Rules
programme.desc: What makes the Kardashians the Kardashians? Take a closer look at the funny, sexy and outrageous moments when we all fell in love with Reality's First Family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Family Feud
programme.desc: Kourtney is devastated when Scott introduces the kids to his girlfriend without her permission. Meanwhile the family is determined to redeem themselves on Celebrity Family Feud at all costs, and Kim encounters an issue with her selfie taking.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: We Love Chicago
programme.desc: Kim prepares for the birth of her third child, Khloé struggles to choose a godparent for her baby, and Kourtney makes her dancing debut in a flash mob.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Perfect Stormi
programme.desc: Kourtney lashes out at her mom over issues from the past, Khloé is devastated by an unexpected loss, and Kylie welcomes her first baby.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: An American Model in Paris
programme.desc: Kourtney is furious when Kim leaks some personal information about her to the family. Meanwhile Kim struggles to make Kanye a priority, and Kendall lets loose on a whirlwind trip to Paris.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Kardashians Take Japan
programme.desc: Kim scrambles to shoot an entire Yeezy season seven campaign while in Japan, but worries that her sisters' questionable fashion sense might jeopardize the debut of the line.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Let's Play Ball!
programme.desc: The Kardashians take on the Jacksons in a charity softball game. Meanwhile, Kris pools her resources to renovate the Watts Empowerment Center, and Khloé and Scott devise a clever plan to reveal Art Vandelay's true identity.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Lord and His Lady
programme.desc: Inspired by the March for Our Lives demonstration, Kim meets with the survivors of the Parkland shooting to learn about their movement. Meanwhile, Scott revives his podcast with Khloé in Cleveland, and Kylie feels insecure about her post-baby body.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Betrayal
programme.desc: Khloé is blindsided by some devastating news about her relationship just days before her due date. Meanwhile, Kim worries that Khloe's delivery will fall on the day of her high school reunion, and Scott and Kendall team up to do some extreme sports.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Bringing Up Baby
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah get more than they bargain for when they give Todd and Julie the weekend off parental duties. With their free time, Todd and Julie rekindle their romance.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Celebrating a Chrisley Century
programme.desc: To celebrate 100 episodes of Chrisley Knows Best, the family takes a look back on all the greatest, most meaningful and overly ridiculous moments from the show.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Training Faye
programme.desc: Julie gets frustrated when the family use Chloe's birthday as a reason to compete against each other. Nanny Faye gets more than she bargained for when Todd insists on being her trainer.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd and Pony Show
programme.desc: Todd becomes Faye's assistant after finding out that she's been making Julie to run all of her errands. Meanwhile, Savannah gets over-excited when Chloe shows an interest in horseback riding.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: A Date with Destiny
programme.desc: A newly single Chase gets caught off guard when his family sets him up on a double blind date. Meanwhile, Todd struggles with how to handle Grayson's latest homework assignment.

programme.desc: The tournament continues with families from Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives. Guy Fieri is challenging these dynamic family duos make classic culinary duos, starting with a list of key ingredients they must feature in their burgers and fries.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: DDD Family Tournament Part 1
programme.desc: Food and family collide as Guy Fieri brings three DDD family duos to Flavortown to compete. First, they shop for ingredients using only their bare hands.

programme.title: Top Chef: Bourbon, Barrels and Burgoo
programme.desc: A very pregnant Gail Simmons asks the chefs to feed her cravings in a special Quickfire delivery. Then it's time to celebrate two iconic Kentucky mainstays: local cuisine and bourbon. The Chefs head to Makers Mark, the oldest distillery in America.

programme.title: Top Chef: Naughty and Nice

programme.title: Top Chef: Surprise ... It's Restaurant Wars
programme.desc: In a massive twist, Padma's favourite challenge 'Restaurant Wars' comes early this year, but before the chefs gear up for battle, they must first duke it out in an amuse bouche-based quick fire for a pair of James Beard winning chefs.

programme.title: Top Chef: Restaurant Wars, Part Two

programme.title: Top Chef: Roaring Munchies

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Scottish Claymore
programme.desc: Four blade smiths face one of the most grueling challenges in Forged in Fire history when the electric and power tools are taken away from them and they must forge a blade with just fire and their bare hands.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Genghis Khan's Sword
programme.desc: Four smiths are tasked with forging signature blades from salvaged materials from a go-kart. The two finalists must recreate the favoured sword of one of the most notorious leaders in history, Genghis Khan.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Family Edition
programme.desc: Two families go head-to-head in an all-out battle. After being tasked with making a canister Damascus blade, two competitors will be left to recreate the rapier used by Inigo Montoya from 'The Princess Bride'.

programme.desc: The smiths create signature blades from 1095 steel. Then, two smiths return to their home forges to recreate one of the longest swords in the forge, the Chinese Zhanmadao.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The German Dussage
programme.desc: Four blade smiths are tasked with making a canister damascus blade from threaded bolts. After a couple of intense rounds and some brutal testing, two smiths return to their home forges to recreate the deadly German Dussage Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: French Pioneer Sword
programme.desc: Four smiths are out on the farm to salvage steel from old farm equipment to make classic chef knives. Only two smiths will slice and dice their way to the final round where they must forge the iconic Rooster Head French Pioneer sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Cane Sword
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths must forge Doug Marcadia's favourite blade, the Karambit, and create a matching pair of lethal knives. Once Doug and the judges choose the finalists, the remaining bladesmiths must re-create the deadly and debonair Cane Sword.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Moonwalking
programme.desc: Someone brings in a flag from NASA's final mission to the moon autographed by the crew of Apollo 16. Rick is presented with an 1861 Civil War Colt musket that is mysteriously perfect in every detail.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Going Postal
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with an American postage printing plate from 1862. A guy comes in with a rare recording of a speech by Martin Luther King Jr. given just months before his assassination.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pirate's Booty
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars find themselves sailing on strange tides when a street-legal pirate ship parade float cruises their way.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Free Willie
programme.desc: A San Francisco Giants uniform owned by baseball legend Willie Mays has Chum and Corey seeing green.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Corey's Big Splurge
programme.desc: The guys remember the '80s as they check out a replica of the proton pack from 'Ghostbusters.' Then, a seller brings in an original work by the street artist Banksy, and Rick and Corey take their 1951 'Steve McQueen' Chevy to an auction.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Shekel and Hyde
programme.desc: The guys try to make a deal for a 2,000-year-old Shekel of Tyre, the same type of coin given to Judas to betray Christ. Then, Rick and the Old Man check out a pair of engraved Colt pistols from the 1860s.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Choo Choo Chum
programme.desc: A signed photo of Howard Hughes flies into the shop. Then, Rick takes his best shot when a Marlin rifle triggers his interest. Later, after Rick purchases an old model train, Chumlee decides to play conductor.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bang Bang
programme.desc: Join the front lines as Rick gets spooked when a WWII embalming kit invades the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Smoking Gun
programme.desc: A Brown Bess musket makes its way into the shop, and Rick hopes to hit the target with a deal. Then, Rick holds a piece of United States history when someone brings in Thomas Jefferson's personal copy of Jay's Treaty.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Napoleon Bonapawn
programme.desc: A rare Rolling Stones record makes its way to the shop. Corey tackles a football that was used in the first Hall of Fame game. Then, Rick's on guard when three swords from the Napoleonic era arrive. Later, Chum gets animated with Donald Duck model sheets.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Lock, Stock, and Pawn
programme.desc: An all-star Dodger's baseball memorabilia bench, a 19th century Hobbs & Co. lock box, an original Woody Woodpecker oil painting, and a set of educational books called the Delphian Course.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Wound Up Rick
programme.desc: An autograph Led Zeppelin album; an antique whistle collection; a Doonesbury cartoon pencils; a self-winding clock.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Under Pressure
programme.desc: A drawing of John Lennon; Senator William Sharon's engraved menu from the Comstock Lode; a Role water pressure tester; a 1950s Buddy Lee doll.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Up, Up and Away
programme.desc: An original Superman costume catches Rick and Corey's attention. Rick wants to fetch a good price for a retro computer, while Corey determines the value of two vintage music posters. Chumlee tries to get a good deal for a 1980s Rhodes piano.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Highly Explosive Pawn
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck when a British Navy gunpowder bucket blasts into the shop and a seller approaches the Pawn Stars to present them with a past prop from 'Back to the Future, Part II.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn of the Undead
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars stake a claim to an original 1800's Vampire defense kit. Then, Rick gets a chance to buy a work from one of America's most famous artists, James Whistler. Next, Rick takes a look at a James Bond prop from the movie GoldenEye.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Shooting Pawns
programme.desc: As Rick tests a Civil War revolver, Chum checks out a personal piece of memorabilia from LeBron James. Later, Rick falls for a 4500-year-old meteorite as Corey, Chum and Antwan look to score some motorcycles.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Lost at Chel-Sea
programme.desc: The kids accidentally get stuck on a cruise ship alone, while Raven and Chelsea desperately try to catch up with them via Jet Ski.

programme.desc: Joey and Parker’s room is so filthy that they try to get the girls to clean it for them. After losing a bet, the girls spend the night in the boys’ room and Liv regrets blaming her sister for losing after Maddie goes missing in Parker's tunnels.

programme.desc: Unbeknownst to Raven, Nia is starting to feel like their apartment isn't big enough for everyone and turns to her dad Devon for help.

programme.desc: Amanda Lindhout was a journalist braving the world's most dangerous hotspots. Then, she became the story. What she endured from her captors was terrifying. Years later they found her again and secret agents put a daring undercover sting into action.

programme.title: The DNA of Murder With Paul Holes: Killer Roommate

programme.desc: On November 23, 2012, Pennsylvania DJ Ervin Holton is found shot dead on his friend's porch. With no witnesses, investigators spot cameras outside a nearby store Pointing directly at the crime scene.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Man in the Red Jacket
programme.desc: On Valentine's night, 2015, 27-year-old James Enright is stabbed to death outside a busy train station in Burnaby, Canada. Despite cell phone footage of the attack, police struggle to identify his killer, until CCTV leads them to an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: See No Evil: Maurice's Last Visitor
programme.desc: On December 10th, 2011, Maurice Byrd is found dead in his home with multiple gunshot wounds. Security footage from a neighboring church reveals that prior to his body being discovered, Maurice had many visitors.

programme.title: See No Evil: A Date with Dalene
programme.desc: On August 6th 2011, Dalene Carlson vanishes during a Saturday night on the town. Security footage from a local bar reveals a number of potential suspects, each with a motive.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Tape the Scene
programme.desc: Agnes Bram, an 82-year-old Middleton, Wisconsin woman is found murdered in her garage. As detectives develop their case, a city-wide manhunt follows, and investigators are forced to curb public hysteria with the need to ensure he doesn't kill again.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: John joins the hunt for prominent community members Torin and Rena Smith, who absconded from justice after being accused of shocking crimes; Cal pulls back the curtain on Carnell Spencer Lee Jr., a vicious criminal with a dark and menacing past.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: When a costly mistake allows a criminal to escape justice, John steps in to help investigators in pursuit of felon Lester Eubanks. And Cal looks into the case of William Stanson, a supposed loving father who turned out to be a sexual predator.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Tape the Scene
programme.desc: Agnes Bram, an 82-year-old Middleton, Wisconsin woman is found murdered in her garage. As detectives develop their case, a city-wide manhunt follows, and investigators are forced to curb public hysteria with the need to ensure he doesn't kill again.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: John joins the hunt for prominent community members Torin and Rena Smith, who absconded from justice after being accused of shocking crimes; Cal pulls back the curtain on Carnell Spencer Lee Jr., a vicious criminal with a dark and menacing past.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: When a costly mistake allows a criminal to escape justice, John steps in to help investigators in pursuit of felon Lester Eubanks. And Cal looks into the case of William Stanson, a supposed loving father who turned out to be a sexual predator.

programme.title: See No Evil: A Date with Dalene
programme.desc: On August 6th 2011, Dalene Carlson vanishes during a Saturday night on the town. Security footage from a local bar reveals a number of potential suspects, each with a motive.

programme.title: Dead of Night: Last Call
programme.desc: Two young mothers living hundreds of miles apart vanish under eerily similar circumstances. Years pass without a single lead in either case until a Missouri police officer's routine house call uncovers the most unlikely suspect.

programme.title: Dead of Night: Kill Me Twice
programme.desc: Allentown, PA loses all sense of security when a calculated serial killer starts preying on unsuspecting women in the middle of the night. When one woman refuses to be his next victim, the killer goes on a relentless tirade that ends in his own demise.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hold the Line
programme.desc: In August 1992, millionaire Tennessee landowner Allen Roberts arrives home to discover his wife is missing. He tells police he received a ransom call for Doe's safe return. Slowly, the town turns on Allen: until police take note of one odd neighbor.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Have you Seen Me?
programme.desc: Debora Gail Moody vanished into thin air from her home in Ludowici Georgia. A decade passes in her case with no answers, but her family persisted by posting billboards all around town. Eleven years later, a confession reveals the chilling details.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In Too Deep
programme.desc: Prominent business people John and Liz Calvert, vanish in 2008 from upscale paradise Hilton Head, SC. Friends, sheriff's investigators and local reporters recall the shock and disbelief the couple disappeared without a trace from a place so peaceful.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hunting Season
programme.desc: A 27 year old mother of two disappeared from a small vacation town in Wisconsin in 2008. Family, friends, local reporters and police investigators recall the fear and sadness the shocking crime instilled on their tight-knit community.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Route 29
programme.desc: In August 2013, a 17-year-old rising social media star and high school athlete disappeared along the infamous Route 29. A massive search by local and federal authorities yielded zero results until a security video revealed a chilling clue.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Unsafe Anywhere
programme.desc: 21 year old Joel Larson is shot to death in a safe haven community for gay people in 1990's Minneapolis. Two more shootings terrorize the community as they realize a serial killer in disguise lives among them.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: We're Watching You
programme.desc: 40 year-old Rachael Anderson, mother of four, calls an old friend one Friday evening in April 2010 about a home improvement project she'd never complete. Eight years later, she's still missing, and two men are behind bars.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Dorothy Did Right
programme.desc: The murder of a beloved church lady sends the easy-going town of Georgiana, Alabama into a whirlwind. In a community where local gossip is rarely exciting, the rumors spreading across town have detectives struggling to separate fact from fiction.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who Killed the Music?
programme.desc: When John Tarwacki Sr. discovers the bodies of his son and daughter-in-law, the only story told at the scene is found in the snow. Boot prints reveal the path the killer took, but the search for motive will lead police in a startling direction.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Secrets of a Country Store
programme.desc: As the last dry county in the state of Alabama, Clay County is a place stuck in time. When local bootlegger Billy Triplett and his wife turn up dead in the town of Barfield, locals suspect it must have had something to do with his illegal side-business.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Wicked Witness
programme.desc: What begins as a frantic 911 call to help an assaulted neighbor ends in the most bizarre investigation the small town of Walsenburg, Colorado has ever seen - complete with a twisted tale of torture, family secrets, and a fallen Jehovah's Witness.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Killing Mussolini
programme.desc: A look at the once all-powerful Mussolini, friend of the Fuhrer, who ended his days hanging upside down like a grotesque animal carcass in Milan's Piazzale Loreto.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Chernobyl Disaster: As We Watched
programme.desc: The catastrophic Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant in the Ukraine created the worst atomic energy accident in world history, endangering the lives of millions of people.

programme.title: L.A. Riots: As We Watched
programme.desc: The LA riots of 1992 shocked the nation. It was the most deadly civil unrest in American history. Over 3000 fires were set; over 50 people died; nearly a billion dollars in property damage. For six days in 1992, the world watched as LA burned.

programme.title: Jonestown Massacre: As We Watched
programme.desc: This hour goes inside the People's Temple to see how Jim Jones lured 1000 Americans to Guyana and forced them to die in the largest mass murder-suicide in U.S. history prior to 9/11.

programme.title: Iran Hostage Crisis: As We Watched
programme.desc: In this riveting hour we relive the high stakes drama of the Iran hostage crisis, from the terrifying moment when the American embassy is seized on November 4th, 1979, to the last minute negotiations that freed the hostages 444 days later.

programme.title: L.A. Riots: As We Watched
programme.desc: The LA riots of 1992 shocked the nation. It was the most deadly civil unrest in American history. Over 3000 fires were set; over 50 people died; nearly a billion dollars in property damage. For six days in 1992, the world watched as LA burned.

programme.desc: This hour goes inside the People's Temple to see how Jim Jones lured 1000 Americans to Guyana and forced them to die in the largest mass murder-suicide in U.S. history prior to 9/11.

programme.desc: The catastrophic Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant in the Ukraine created the worst atomic energy accident in world history, endangering the lives of millions of people.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars

programme.title: Forbidden History: Killing Mussolini
programme.desc: A look at the once all-powerful Mussolini, friend of the Fuhrer, who ended his days hanging upside down like a grotesque animal carcass in Milan's Piazzale Loreto.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Combat Tech: ROVs
programme.desc: Go inside the robotic warriors and unmanned war machines that are taking their place on the front lines and spearheading a revolution on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.desc: A showcase of gourmet food for holiday entertaining or for gift giving.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: When One Barn Door Closes
programme.desc: After restoring a fourth bedroom in the Shirtwaist home, Tamara creates a reading nook and closet to complete the room. Then the Kansas City weather creates a problem in the front yard, while two vanities might not fit in the master bath.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating an expansive 1950s ranch-style home. She updates the exterior with faux stone and adds another floor to the 3,000-square-foot home, but rain and an old fireplace force her to rethink her plans and budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Stairway to Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara Day uses her 1,400-square-foot second-story addition to create three new bedrooms in a 1950 ranch home.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Mike and the crew start a new home that was left half-finished by a contractor and find tons of problems behind the walls. Michael and designer Kimm go shopping for flooring with some furry friends, and Sherry and Cali take baby steps getting to work.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Healthy Holmes
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son renovate his home so he and his girlfriend can start a family.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Fresh Start
programme.desc: Mike meets a woman who needs help tackling projects that have accumulated since her husband passed 10 years ago. At The Half Done House, Sherry teaches the apprentices as they frame out the living room's focal point: a show-stopping fireplace.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: A single homeowner is too proud to ask for help with the maintenance issues and repairs that come with living in an older home. When neighbors begin complaining, Next Generation steps in to help her improve the curb appeal and remove the backyard pool.

programme.desc: Chris helps Christine and her boyfriend Chris, whose large yard and upper deck are both completely plain. Chris adds a large built in deck planter box and adds a built in barbecue, grill prep area and wood plank bar, along with a dining table.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Mountain Retreat
programme.desc: Sonora persuades Chris to come see her backyard in her brand new house, a big empty space with one huge redwood tree in the middle. Using that for inspiration, Chris comes up with a mountain retreat.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Vintage Chic
programme.desc: Wendy and Demond want an outdoor space to cook and chill in. Chris puts in a new concrete patio, a custom outdoor kitchen and a sports scoreboard.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Bye Bye Above Ground Pool, Hello Raised Cabana Style Deck
programme.desc: The Arthurs’ deck is too small and there are no railings separating the deck from the above ground pool. Chris comes to their rescue by demoing the deck and pool, and building a new large cabana-style deck with dining space, grilling space and bar.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Waterfall Oasis
programme.desc: Homeowners Melanie and Ian have a lackluster backyard and they want a space to entertain and relax in with their family and friends.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Mid Century Modern Makeover
programme.desc: Chris gives this couple an outdoor kitchen, herb garden, and shade over a dining area.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Rustic Romantic Haven
programme.desc: Chris Lambton and his team takes this narrow dust bowl of a yard and converts it into a rustic romantic haven with a metal hanging bed and natural flagstone patio.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Boring Yard Becomes Rustic Retreat in Reno
programme.desc: Robert and Dana love their backyard view but hate their backyard. It's boring, overgrown and nondescript and they beg Chris to give them an inviting space for dining, entertaining and playing guitar.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Urban Bar Hangout
programme.desc: Chris and the crew convert a blank slate of a backyard into a custom urban hangout with a zinc bar and a stainless steel BBQ grill, all underneath a large redwood pergola.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Beachy Outdoor Kitchen
programme.desc: Eric and Cristin Botsford have a large back yard but there's nothing in it. They dream of a beachy escape that reflects their love of the ocean and Chris delivers.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Modern Splash Bar
programme.desc: This small suburban backyard is in need of a major overhaul. Chris and his crew install a redwood deck surrounding a spa with an attached bar for entertainment.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Island Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the Barnwood Builders take the logs from season 3's Bird's-Eye Barn across the New River and put them back together on a West Virginia island.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Log Cabin Dream Come True
programme.desc: Tammy Harrah and her late husband dreamed of running a craft store in a log cabin on their West Virginia family homestead. The guys make this dream come true for her and her son building a cabin for them and making some homemade crafts for the store.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Log Kitchen Drop In
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders head to Cashiers, North Carolina, to build an antique log cabin in the middle of a huge, framed-out modern home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Unwrapping a Massive Log Tobacco Barn
programme.desc: Mark buys a massive tobacco barn with an incredible log structure hidden inside. He wants to turn the logs into a cabin, so the guys must unwrap the barn layer by layer.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barn Beam Log Cabin Experiment
programme.desc: Mark clients want bigger and bigger antique log homes, but pioneers didn't build big log cabins. They did build big barns though, so the guys try and build a 1200 sq. foot cabin using barn beams from their inventory.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Obsessions
programme.desc: Food Network stars reveal foods they can't live without. Find out what Giada will do for just one more bite of lemon-scallion Dungeness crab, and how many spicy Buffalo wings Aaron McCargo Jr. can eat in a day.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Pizza
programme.desc: Top Food Network chefs offer ideas on where to find the best pizza.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent D.C. Dining
programme.desc: Michael and Jenni 'JWoww' Farley, reality TV star and winner of Worst Cooks in America: Celebrity Edition, team up to tackle the best classic barbecue, freshest farmhouse burgers and most outrageous microbrews our nation's capital has to offer.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Southern, Spicy and Sweet
programme.desc: Bobby Flay makes a surprise guest appearance as Michael visits an over-the-top barbecue joint in New York with a one-of-a-kind brontosaurus beef rib. In Nashville, local tradition is hot chicken, Michael pushes his personal limit.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Champion Burger Knockouts
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in San Diego with a Champ Burger loaded with beer-braised pork that packs a powerful punch, and he can't pass up a cookie-brownie mashup that satisfies every sweet tooth.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon tackles towering burgers piled with spicy Korean pork bulgogi and juicy pork belly pastrami. In Denver, a modern-day sloppy joe is loaded with iconic brisket burnt ends. Finally, a fusion spot in Tulsa serves lamb-chili.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Insane Inventions
programme.desc: Roger Mooking says goodbye to the standard grill and celebrates the most elaborate, over-the-top smokers and roasters.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pit Bosses
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is honoring the legendary pitmasters who make some of the country's best barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoked Out
programme.desc: Where there's fire, there's smoke, and some of the most flavourful meat on the market.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Old School, New School
programme.desc: Roger Mooking gets schooled by two pitmasters changing the barbecue game in Charleston, S.C. One has a pit room where whole hogs get cooked low and slow. The other makes Tex-Mex with smokes meats from a massive smoker.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Genoa
programme.desc: Andrew takes a look at the inventive and time-honored eats of Genoa, Italy. A stunning location bursting with vibrant herbs and ancient technique, Genoa is in one of Italy's smallest regions.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Deep Fried
programme.desc: From crispy-fried pork schnitzel and the spiciest chicken on the planet to crunchy pork cracklings and Roman artichokes, Andrew Zimmern travels the globe to find the guiltiest deep-fried pleasures.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Scottish Highlands
programme.desc: Andrew explores the bountiful larder and proud history that provides chefs in the Scottish Highlands with the building blocks for uniquely Highland dishes. He enjoys lean, flavourful Highland beef, buttery shellfish, and handheld meat pies.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Oaxaca
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores regional specialties in Oaxaca, Mexico. From complex mole negro sauce over Mayan-era tamales and crispy tortilla with pork lard to egg bread dunked in hot chocolate, local tradition flavors each bite.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Brunch
programme.desc: Indulge your weekend cravings at some of the most unique brunch spots from the nation's capitol, to New York, to the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Cupcakes
programme.desc: We'll take you from coast to coast to taste the most unique cupcakes in the country. Indulge in artisanal cupcakes paired with beer and wine; stuff yourself with custard-filled cupcakes.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Southern Favorites
programme.desc: Highlighting some of the most unique takes on southern home cooking.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Burgers
programme.desc: Come see what's between the buns at these burger joints that are taking the American classic to the next level. Whether it's with foie gras in Philly, pimento cheese in Atlanta, umami in Los Angeles or truffles in New York.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Ice Cream
programme.desc: If you like ice cream, you will be wowed by these unique treats. How about bourbon and corn flakes flavoured scoops at Humphry Slocombe? Or the sweets at Sweet Rose Creamery where everything from the cones to the chocolate chips are made from scratch.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Sandwiches
programme.desc: Jewish Deli in New York serves up their signature smoked meat; unique sandwiches.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Burritos, Kabobs and S'Mores
programme.desc: In St. Louis, Brad Miller visits the Seoul Taco truck, where Chef David Choi is serving up a unique spin on Mexican food by infusing it with the flavours of Korea. Brad samples a gogi bowl and the popular Korean barbecue burrito with kimchi rice.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Hot Chicken, Spicy Beef and Ice Cream Sundaes
programme.desc: Brad Miller begins his culinary adventure in Nashville at Red's 615 Kitchen food truck, where Chef Eric White is known for his take on the local favorite, hot chicken.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Ribs, Ramen and Gooey Butter Cake
programme.desc: Brad Miller's food truck trek starts at Wood Shop BBQ in Seattle, where Chef Matt Davis serves up massive smoked beef ribs and chicken wings tossed in his special Kansas City-style barbecue sauce. Next up is the Hapa PDX truck in Portland, Ore.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Pork Buns, Falafel and Snow Cones
programme.desc: Brad Miller hits the road in St. Louis, where he gets a taste of authentic Hawaiian food from Buzz's Hawaiian Grill food truck. Brad tries Chef Thomas "Buzz" Moore's signature yellow fin tuna poke bowl.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Holy Smokes!
programme.desc: Roger attends the 100 year anniversary of the St. Mary Magdalene Church Picnic in Owensboro, Kentucky. Several thousand pounds of meat will cook over 100 feet of fire and smoke.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Three-Alarm Fire
programme.desc: Roger visits Faith's Farm in Bonfield, IL for an awesome feast cooked on three different fiery contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Grillin' and Smokin'
programme.desc: Roger is grilling steaks and chickens in California, and smoking a bounty of seafood in Illinois. High heat for meat and low smoke for seafood.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming

programme.desc: Carrie gets angry when she catches Doug fantasizing about other women while he's sedated.

programme.desc: Arthur finds himself in a bit of a quandary when he tries to sell his extra burial plot.

programme.desc: Doug disowns Deacon when he becomes friends with Doug's grade-school archenemy.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Precedent Nixin
programme.desc: Carrie plans to avoid her in-laws by staying at a hotel in Florida but it all goes awry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: Date With the Devil
programme.desc: Recently-divorced mom Ingrid Lyne dips her toes back into the dating scene and meets a man online. But her date at a baseball game would be her last. The next day investigators are shocked by a chilling crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Portrait of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer terrorizes a small Texas town.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: A Killer Disguise
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered in a crowded parking lot in broad daylight.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Portrait of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer terrorizes a small Texas town.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Idaho Death Trap
programme.desc: The Jackson family in Idaho suffers from a cabin on the verge of collapse and a predator threat for 100 chickens. The Raneys use all new ingenuity to make the cabin livable, protect the flock and create a valuable income source.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Troubled Water
programme.desc: The Raneys help an Oregon couple with a toxic salt water well, who are desperate for a viable water source. Marty needs clay to build a massive catchment pond and Matt must build a large scale solar still to de-contaminate the water.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Smoky Mountain Fury

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Volcano's Edge
programme.desc: The Raneys put their ingenuity to the test on a homestead in Hawaii that was destroyed by 20-foot thick lava flow. First they must bring life back to the property, then figure out how to make the structures mobile in case of another eruption.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Arizona Washout

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountain Modern
programme.desc: A father-son duo builds an off-grid home in Montana's Flathead Valley. The 720-square-foot stick-frame home takes advantage of the mountain winds using a wind-turbine generator for power and features plenty of upcycled materials from the surrounding area.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Chasing That Dream

programme.title: Botched: Mother Knows Breast
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif comes to the rescue of a cat lady, setting both her nose and her priorities straight. Dr. Dubrow assists a young woman who had a double mastectomy to beat cancer, and two pop stars try to make their way to center stage.

programme.title: Botched: Double Bubble and No Butt Trouble
programme.desc: A pop star impersonator visits the doctors after silicone injections left her with a dented chin. Then, a young woman finally reveals her bad boob job to her mom after years of suffering.

programme.title: Tia and Tamera: V-Steam My What?!
programme.desc: Tamera gets more proactive in her career and begins developing a sitcom project. While waiting to hear if her pilot will be picked up, Tia attends a red carpet event.

programme.title: Tia and Tamera: My Wife's a Stripper?
programme.desc: Tia performs in a burlesque show to prove she's still got it, while Tamera decides whether or not to attend a poker tournament in Vegas.

programme.title: Tia and Tamera: The House Always Wins
programme.desc: The sisters head to Vegas for a fun girls weekend where they attend a drag show. Tamera is forced to choose between her husband and a celebrity poker tournament with Tia.

programme.title: Tia and Tamera: Sistervention
programme.desc: Tamera tries reconciling Andrea and Tia, while Tia conspires to make-over Tamera's wardrobe.

programme.title: Tia and Tamera: Boot Camp Brawl
programme.desc: After an unflattering picture appears online, Tia talks Tamera and Jerome into going to a military-styled boot camp.

programme.title: Tia and Tamera: Mo' Baby, Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Tia discusses another child with Cory. Tamera auditions for a talk show amidst stiff competition. Later, the sisters consult a communication expert.

programme.title: Tia and Tamera: Raising Cree
programme.desc: Tia asks Tamera to be Cree's legal guardian, but the feeling isn't mutual when it comes to Aden. Tia also considers stardom for Cree. Meanwhile, the sisters argue about launching a second product.

programme.title: Tia and Tamera: The Truth About the Twins
programme.desc: Tamera questions whether she and Tia are identical twins and convinces Tia to take a DNA test. Meanwhile, the twins move forward developing their newest product, but can't agree on the scent.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: True Story
programme.desc: The family rushes to Cleveland to be by Khloé's side while she gives birth and comes face to face with Tristan for the first time since news of his infidelity broke. Kim reconnects with old friends at her 20-year high school reunion.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Vegas, Baby!
programme.desc: Khloé and Tristan head back to LA with baby True. Unresolved tension lingers between Kim and Tristan due to his infidelity. Kourtney travels to DC to talk with Congress. Kim heads to Vegas with her girlfriends prove she's still a wild girl.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Stacking the Deck
programme.desc: Kim returns to Paris for the first time since the robbery. Meanwhile Kourtney fears she waited too long to freeze her eggs, and Kendall worries she'll humiliate herself in a charity poker tournament.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Break Free
programme.desc: Kim devotes her time and energy to helping free Alice Johnson from prison. Khloé stresses about spending her first night away from baby True, and Kanye finds himself in hot water over some controversial comments.

programme.title: Movie: Selena
programme.desc: The life story of Mexican-American singer Selena, whose dreams were cut short at age 23.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Burger Brawl
programme.desc: Tyler gives the five remaining food truck teams a terrifying gator challenge in Fort Myers, Florida. They have to step up their game with a burger that takes creative risks and face a secret chef judge.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Shake Showdown
programme.desc: Tyler makes the four remaining food truck teams throw javelins to determine their protein in a skewer challenge. A Sonic Drive-In shake challenge puts everyone's sweet skills to the test and an elimination twist changes everything.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Miami Meltdown
programme.desc: Tyler spends time with each food truck in Miami, Florida to see what makes them tick. The teams must create a crowd-pleasing pork dish and an innovative coffee creation. With the finale so close, tensions flare up like never before.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Key Lime Clash
programme.desc: Tyler meets the final two food trucks as they go head-to-head in sunny Key West, FL. A spiny lobster, a key lime challenge and an unexpected visitor galvanize the teams to give it their all in the final push. One team walks away with the big prize.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: First Class Food Fight
programme.desc: Tyler Florence kicks off the race in Los Angeles, the food truck capital of the world. Seven teams of food truck owners are challenged to make and sell luxe versions of traditional food truck fare.

programme.title: Vegas Chef Prizefight: It's All About the Show
programme.desc: Since everything is bigger and better in Las Vegas, Chef Anne Burrell gets the chefs cooking with a larger-than-life ingredient. Then, dinner service takes place at the world-renowned Mr. Chow at Caesars Palace.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Paradise: Impossible
programme.desc: Robert Irvine is in South Padre Island, Texas, to help the owners of Padre Rita Grill. This four-year-old business has both food and music, but still isn't doing well.

programme.title: Cake Masters: Hollywood Panorama Cake
programme.desc: It's a Hollywood extravaganza as Duff Goldman and his team rush to create a panoramic cityscape of Tinseltown for a billion-dollar bash and a tiered cake for the 10th anniversary of an animation studio.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: The Battle Begins
programme.desc: Master pastry chefs Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman go head-to-head for the first time ever in a competition to determine the world's best baker. In the first of six bake-off challenges, Buddy and Duff must make their most beloved family recipes.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Carnival and Bollywood
programme.desc: Buddy and Duff face off in a battle of carnival treats. They must satisfy a crowd of hungry amusement park patrons. For the cake-off challenge, they must each create a Bollywood-inspired cake for Aatari Sequeira.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: It's a Dog's Life
programme.desc: Buddy and Duff put their skills to the test making pies that are delicious and beautiful enough to wow the judges. Buddy pays homage to his Old World roots, while Duff follows his artistic impulses. They create dog-themed cakes for Christina Anstead.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Wedding Wars
programme.desc: Duff Goldman brings Buddy Valastro into his world of fine dining with a challenge to create elegant plated desserts. In the cake-off, they must create a cake for celebrity event planner Slomique Hawrylo's bridal fitting event.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Donuts and Magic
programme.desc: Kicking things off in the bake-off challenge, pastry chefs Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman have to handle the morning rush at Los Angeles' iconic Randy's Donuts drive-thru. They prepare dozens of deep-fried delights.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: The Grand Finale
programme.desc: For the finale, pastry chefs Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman head to the Food Network Kitchen to create their most heartfelt and monumental creations yet: chocolate desserts to conceal engagement rings for two surprise proposals.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fast Food Their Way
programme.desc: In Honolulu, Hawaii, there is a 48-year-old drive-in where burgers and dogs come with rice and macaroni salad. In Nashville, Tenn., a Jamaican cafeteria at the farmer's market serves mango chutney chicken and curried goat.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: The Tournament Begins

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Nothing But Potential
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina come across a bank-owned listing that has been on the market for fewer than 24 hours and is only accepting offers until 5:00 p.m. the very same day.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Dirty, Dated and Undesired
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a home listing online that's set for an auction that afternoon and, based on neighbourhood comps, the dirty and dated house looks like a bargain. By outward appearances, all it needs is an inexpensive cosmetic rehab.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Barnyard Dance
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a short sale home in a desirable neighbourhood. Based on comparable homes and what they see on the outside, it seems to be a good buy. Once they tour the home, it becomes immediately clear just how much work and money is needed.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home - Unpacked: Food and Family
programme.desc: Jonathan and Drew help a Richmond newlywed couple expand their single-level home so they can better enjoy weekday meals and family gatherings together.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home - Unpacked: Dream Home in the Vegas Suburbs
programme.desc: When Troy and Susan found out they were having a third child, they bought a new house in the Las Vegas suburbs for them to grow into. The brothers help them with the main floors' awkward layout.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home - Unpacked: Fostering an Upgrade
programme.desc: Jonathan and Drew upgrade a super-sized family's home to give them a modern space the next generation can enjoy.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home - Unpacked: JD and Annalee
programme.desc: Drew and Jonathan's brother JD bought a bachelor pad in a historic Las Vegas neighbourhood eight years ago. Now that's he has proposed to the love of his life, they want the outdated home transformed into a dreamy newlywed home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home - Unpacked: Four Generations and Counting
programme.desc: A couple's two daughters are the fourth generation to live in their home, but the cramped layout isn't functional for their modern family. Jonathan and Drew transform the house while preserving its history to ensure it works for generations to come.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Family Friends
programme.desc: Drew and Jonathan's long-time family friends Brian and Meghan bought a spacious Las Vegas home over 13 years ago. The awkward layout and dated builder-basic spaces are standing in their way of true enjoyment of their home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Family Home Refresh
programme.desc: A couple that bought their home when they were newlyweds are frustrated by the dated kitchen, total lack of storage and closed-off main floor. Jonathan and Drew overhaul the spaces to create a fresh, modern home that will work for years to come.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Stately in White: From '80s to Elegant

programme.title: The Holzer Files: Bloodline

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Black Pearl

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Descent Into Madness

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Romance Reloaded
programme.desc: High school sweethearts Michelle and Britt rekindle their romance after nearly 20 years apart. But this small-town Georgia family is a far cry from the Brady Bunch, bringing unseen baggage that unleashes a nightmare of infidelity, violence and murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death of a Salesman
programme.desc: John Parker marries Judy, a nice girl from the wrong side of the tracks. John uses his wealth and status to keep his new wife happy. But Judy's rumored romantic entanglements with a string of John's employees prove to be too much for John to bear.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dr. Deception
programme.desc: When Jean Claude Dominique is the victim of a hit-and-run, his wife Eliette rushes to his side. It's there she comes face-to-face with his OTHER wife. It's her first glimpse into his double life that leads to her fighting for her own.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Never Coming Home
programme.desc: A mother and her two young sons vanish in rural Wyoming, prompting a nationwide search. Leads dry up and the case goes cold... until a dark secret is revealed, leading investigators to another homicide they had no clue could solve four murders.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Obsession Has Its Price
programme.desc: Bill Douglas is a respected doctor at Tufts University in Boston. But his focus isn't on science – it's on a bombshell prostitute he met in a red light district called the Combat Zone. Together, they lead double lives… leading to someone's murder.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Two-Faced
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a San Francisco businessman is found floating in the California Aqueduct. Investigators initially suspect a family member, but without evidence, the case goes cold. It will take detectives several decades to find the real killer.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth

programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.
